_comment: Branch protection rules for `main`. Issue #21. Apply with: gh api -X PUT repos/VivaldiCode/voice-gateway/branches/main/protection --input .github/branch-protection.json. The schema is documented at https://docs.github.com/en/rest/branches/branch-protection#update-branch-protection. Key choices below: require all 5 CI status checks green, dismiss stale reviews on push, require linear history (forces squash/rebase merges, no merge commits — keeps git log readable), disallow force-push, disallow direct pushes to main. The `enforce_admins` flag means even the project owner has to land through a PR; flip to false during an emergency.
